english_text: They can't get away with this
korean_text: 그들이 이걸 무사히 넘길 수 없어
romanization: geudeuri igeol musahi neomgil su eopseo

english_text: The enemy of my enemy is my friend
Everything is going according to plan
You're not who I thought you were

korean_text: 나는 항상 한 발 앞서 있어
romanization: naneun hangsang han bal apseo isseo

english_text: The pen is mightier than the sword

korean_text: 내 사람들을 절대 배신 안 해
romanization: nae saramdeureul jeoldae baesin an hae

english_text: The battle is won but the war continues
